use_case: W2 §6 citation contract — claims that cite chart-mode facts use source_type 'openemr_record' (the 4th valid enum, alongside lab_pdf, intake_form, guideline_chunk). Today's citation_present cases exercise lab_pdf and guideline_chunk only; this closes the chart-mode gap. A regression that drops 'openemr_record' from the enum would silently break every W1 chart-fact citation.

claims.text: Patient has an active prescription for lisinopril 20 mg daily
Most recent BP measurement is 142/88 from 2026-04-22
